text:
--- import { Icon } from "astro-icon/components"; import Base from "../layouts/base.astro"; const icon = "adjustment"; ---

Welcome to Astro Icon!

The Icon component will optimize and inline any SVG file inside of src/icons/

Local Icons

Automatic Icons from Iconify

If you can find it on Icones, you can render it here!

{
  "name": "starlight-root",
  "private": true,
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "description": "",
  "scripts": {
    "build:examples": "pnpm --no-bail --workspace-concurrency 1 --filter '@example/*' build",
    "lint": "eslint . --max-warnings 0",
    "size": "size-limit",
    "version": "pnpm changeset version && pnpm i --no-frozen-lockfile",
    "format": "prettier -w --cache --plugin prettier-plugin-astro .",
    "typecheck": "astro check --minimumSeverity warning --noSync && pnpm --filter starlight-docs typecheck"
  },
  "license": "MIT",
  "devDependencies": {
    "@astrojs/check": "^0.9.9",
    "@changesets/changelog-github": "^0.6.0",
    "@changesets/cli": "^2.31.0",
    "@eslint/js": "^10.0.1",
    "@size-limit/file": "^12.1.0",
    "astro": "^6.3.1",
    "eslint": "^10.3.0",
    "eslint-config-prettier": "^10.1.8",
    "globals": "^17.6.0",
    "prettier": "3.3.3",
    "prettier-plugin-astro": "^0.14.1",
    "size-limit": "^12.1.0",
    "typescript": "^6.0.3",
    "typescript-eslint": "^8.59.2"
  },
  "packageManager": "pnpm@11.1.1",
  "size-limit": [
    {
      "name": "/index.html",
      "path": "examples/basics/dist/index.html",
      "limit": "8 kB",
      "gzip": true
    },
    {
      "name": "/_astro/*.js",
      "path": "examples/basics/dist/_astro/*.js",
      "limit": "27 kB",
      "gzip": true
    },
    {
      "name": "/_astro/*.css",
      "path": [
        "examples/basics/dist/_astro/*.css",
        "!examples/basics/dist/_astro/print.*.css"
      ],
      "limit": "16.75 kB",
      "gzip": true
    }
  ]
}
